tagline: The Industry Leader in Accurate, Non-Destructive Water Leak Detection and Plumbing Repair

hero.headline:
Find Hidden Leaks Without
the Destruction
hero.subheadline: Leaks hide. We find them — fast, accurately, and without tearing up your property. For over 43 years, Sacramento families and businesses have trusted American Leak Detection to protect their homes with non-invasive technology that pinpoints problems other companies miss.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Leak Detection That Protects<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Property & Wallet
services.subtitle: Hidden leaks cost Sacramento homeowners thousands in water bills and property damage every year. Our advanced, non-invasive technology finds the source fast — so you stop wasting water and start saving money.

cards.title: Home Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced sound and thermal imaging technology pinpoints leaks behind walls, under floors, and in ceilings — no unnecessary demolition required.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Leak Detection
cards.description: Specialized equipment finds leaks in pools, spas, and water features without draining or digging. We locate it, then fix it right.

cards.title: Slab & Foundation Leaks
cards.description: Leaks under concrete slabs cause serious structural damage. We detect them precisely and offer spot repairs or full PEX re-pipes.

cards.title: Sewer Line Detection
cards.description: Broken sewer lines create health hazards and costly damage. Our non-invasive methods locate the problem before excavation begins.

cards.title: Irrigation System Leaks
cards.description: Hidden irrigation leaks waste thousands of gallons monthly. We find breaks and blockages fast to restore efficiency and cut your water bill.

cards.title: High Water Bill Investigation
cards.description: Unexplained spike in your water bill? We trace the source with precision equipment and provide a clear repair plan before any work begins.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Finding Your Leak

steps.title: Call for a Free Estimate
steps.description: Describe the signs you're seeing — high water bill, wet spots, running meter. We'll provide an honest estimate before we even dispatch a technician.

steps.title: Non-Invasive Detection
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive with advanced sound, thermal imaging, and proprietary detection equipment to pinpoint your leak's exact location — without tearing anything apart.

steps.title: Repair & Restore
steps.description: Once located, we recommend the most cost-effective fix — spot repair when possible, or modern PEX piping alternatives. Your property stays intact and your leak is gone.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Operated — Since 1983
about.description: As the fifth American Leak Detection franchise ever established in the nation, we've been protecting Sacramento-area homes and businesses for over 43 years. We're a family-owned, local company that combines national-brand technology with the personal attention only a local operator can deliver. Every technician is trained in our proprietary detection methods — finding leaks others miss, while keeping your property intact.

features.title: Non-Destructive Technology
features.description: Our advanced sound and thermal imaging equipment locates leaks without cutting, digging, or demolishing your property.

features.title: Free Estimates, No Surprises
features.description: We provide honest estimates before dispatch. You know the cost before we arrive — no hidden fees, no pressure.

features.title: 43+ Years of Proven Results
features.description: One of the original ALD franchises in America. Four decades of experience means we've seen and solved every type of leak.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Guesswork.
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with a free estimate before dispatch. We explain the scope, the cost, and your options — so you're never caught off guard.

guarantee.headline: Our "Find It or It's Free" Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every detection with over 43 years of proven accuracy. If we can't locate your leak using our advanced equipment and proprietary methods, you don't pay for the detection. That's the confidence that comes from being one of the original American Leak Detection franchises in the country — we find leaks others simply can't.

faqs.question: How does non-destructive leak detection work?
faqs.answer: We use advanced sound amplification and thermal imaging equipment along with proprietary detection methods developed over 43 years. These tools let us hear and see leaks through walls, slabs, and underground pipes — without any digging or demolition until we know exactly where the problem is.

faqs.question: How quickly can you come out for an inspection?
faqs.answer: Most appointments are scheduled within a few business days. For urgent situations like active flooding or rapidly rising water bills, we offer priority scheduling. Call us and our office team will work to get a technician to you as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair leaks or just detect them?
faqs.answer: We do both. Once we locate your leak, we can perform spot repairs on the spot or recommend full solutions like modern PEX re-piping. We always explain your repair options and costs before any work begins.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Northern California?
faqs.answer: We serve nine counties across Northern California: Sacramento, Placer, El Dorado, Yolo, Sutter, Yuba, Butte, Nevada, and Sierra counties. Whether you're in Roseville, Folsom, Elk Grove, or Auburn — we've got you covered.

faqs.question: Will you need to tear up my property to find the leak?
faqs.answer: That's exactly what makes us different. Our non-invasive technology pinpoints leak locations precisely before any ground is broken. We minimize property intrusion and recommend the least destructive repair method possible — often a simple spot repair rather than a full excavation.

testimonials.name: Dana M. R.
testimonials.text: Max, Jeremy and Maureen were WONDERFUL!! Maureen was able to schedule a quick appointment to survey and repair the issue. Max and Jeremy were courteous and informative about diagnosing where the leaks were occurring and what the repairs would entail. If you are having leak or plumbing issues, American Leak Detection is the company to call. 5-Stars.

testimonials.name: Daniele R.
testimonials.text: Found and fixed what seemed impossible to locate. Technician Max located a leak under our living room slab that two previous companies couldn't find. He also completed the repair work, approximately 11 hours, and restored water service to our home. Outstanding work.

testimonials.name: David P.
testimonials.text: Superb technician. Jeremy isolated and fixed unknown leaks while working through extreme heat of 104 degrees to complete the job professionally. He explained the repair process clearly and went above and beyond to get everything done right.
